title: liparis disticha
intro: Liparis disticha, also known as the twin-leaved orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid found in tropical regions, particularly in Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Liparis disticha include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce swelling, and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction, where the roots are boiled in water to create a medicinal tea.
